name: Crab Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 green onions (scallions, white and green parts), finely chopped
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
8 slices bacon, fried crisp and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crab meat, celery, scallions, mushrooms, caraway, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper in a bowl and mix until thoroughly combined.
2. Toast the bread on one side under the broiler.
3. Spread the crab mixture on the untoasted side of each slice of bread.
4. Top with bacon and cheddar cheese.
5. Return to the broiler until the cheese is melted.
